tool.name: crYOLO Config
tool.command:
python -c " import cryolo.config_tools as ct #if str($filter_section.filter_type) == 'LOWPASS': filter_list = [$filter_section.low_pass_cutoff, 'filtered_tmp/'] #elif str($filter_section.filter_type) == 'JANNI': filter_list = ['$filter_section.janni_model', $filter_section.janni_overlap, $filter_section.janni_batches, 'filtered_tmp/'] #else: filter_list = None #end if
ct.generate_config_file( config_out_path='$config_out', architecture='$architecture', input_size=$input_size, anchors=[$boxsize, $boxsize], max_box_per_image=700, num_patches=$num_patches, overlap_patches=$overlap_patches, filter=filter_list, train_image_folder='', train_annot_folder='', train_times=$train_opts.train_times, pretrained_weights='', batch_size=$train_opts.batch_size, learning_rate=$train_opts.learning_rate, nb_epoch=$train_opts.nb_epoch, object_scale=$train_opts.object_scale, no_object_scale=$train_opts.no_object_scale, coord_scale=$train_opts.coord_scale, class_scale=$train_opts.class_scale, log_path='logs/', saved_weights_name='cryolo_model.h5', debug=True, valid_image_folder='', valid_annot_folder='', valid_times=1, normalization='$normalization' ) "

param.name: boxsize
param.label: Box Size (Pixels)
param.help: Specify target box size / particle diameter.

param.name: input_size
param.label: Input Image Size
param.help: Dimension to downsize shorter micrograph side to. Must be a multiple of 32.

param.name: num_patches
param.label: Number of Patches
param.help: Tessellation patch mode. Recommended value is 1.

param.name: overlap_patches
param.label: Overlap Between Patches
param.help: Only needed if using patch mode.

param.name: train_times
param.label: Train Times
param.help: How often each image is presented to the network per epoch.

tool.help:
**What it does**
This tool generates a JSON configuration file for crYOLO, detailing network architecture backends, sizing parameters, filters, and scales. This configuration file is required for both the Training and Prediction processes.
